---
title: "All Publications"
---

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

data = await FileAttachment("_data/publications.json").json()
pubs = data.publications

viewof search = Inputs.text({
  label: "Search",
  placeholder: "Title, author, journal...",
  width: 400
})

viewof yearFilter = Inputs.select(
  ["All years", ...new Set(pubs.map(p => p.year).filter(Boolean).sort().reverse())],
  { label: "Year" }
)

viewof perOnly = Inputs.toggle({ label: "Physics Education Research only", value: false })

filtered = pubs.filter(p => {
  const q = search.toLowerCase()
  const matchSearch = !q ||
    (p.title  || "").toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
    (p.authors || []).join(" ").toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
    (p.journal || "").toLowerCase().includes(q)
  const matchYear = yearFilter === "All years" || p.year === yearFilter
  const matchPer  = !perOnly || p.is_per
  return matchSearch && matchYear && matchPer
})

md`**Showing ${filtered.length} of ${pubs.length} publications** — last updated ${data.last_updated}`

Inputs.table(filtered, {
  columns: ["year", "title", "authors", "journal"],
  header: {
    year:    "Year",
    title:   "Title",
    authors: "Authors",
    journal: "Journal"
  },
  format: {
    title: (t, i) => {
      const pub = filtered[i]
      return pub.url ? htl.html`<a href="${pub.url}" target="_blank">${t}</a>` : t
    },
    authors: a => (a || []).join(", ")
  },
  rows: 20
})
```
